Experience

Building production ML systems that deliver measurable business impact.

Data Science Intern
Aug 2025 – Oct 2025
Skillfied Mentor · Remote, India
  • Engineered targeted feature pipelines and applied EDA on 50,000+ imbalanced records using Pandas, NumPy, and Seaborn; boosted model F1-score by 12% over baseline through rigorous feature selection and data preprocessing.
  • Designed and deployed real-time prediction APIs using Flask and FastAPI with integrated model monitoring via Prometheus; reduced post-deployment false positive rate by 8% by proactively detecting and responding to prediction drift.

Featured Projects

Production-grade ML systems with full MLOps pipelines.

01 / Churn Prediction
Customer Churn Prediction & Business Insights

Full ML pipeline — XGBoost, LightGBM, Random Forest with Optuna-driven tuning and MLflow tracking on DagsHub. Containerized FastAPI serving via Docker, DVC-managed data pipeline on DagsHub S3. SHAP surfaced top churn drivers for revenue impact strategy.

02 / Fraud Detection
Real-Time Fraud Detection API with Full MLOps Pipeline

XGBoost + LightGBM with SMOTE oversampling and ensemble stacking on ULB Credit Card dataset. FastAPI + Docker with sub-50ms inference, Prometheus/Grafana monitoring, automated retraining via GitHub Actions CI/CD when drift detected.

<50msLatency

03 / GenAI / RAG
DocMind — AI-Powered PDF Q&A Chatbot using RAG

Full RAG pipeline — PyMuPDF extraction, HuggingFace all-MiniLM-L6-v2 embeddings, ChromaDB vector store, LLaMA 3.1 8B on Groq (750+ tokens/sec). Sub-50ms retrieval, RAGAS Faithfulness 0.91, 60%+ hallucination reduction via prompt engineering.
